artifact_role: GU-owned operational research portfolio. It does not change claim status, canon, proof grade, verdict, or public posture.

authority.external_data_adjudication_owner: phenomenology role, returned by frozen packet

selection_contract.score_scale: Each component is an integer from 1 to 5. Higher impact, information gain, readiness, distinctiveness, and time sensitivity help. Higher effort, wall risk, and duplication risk hurt.
selection_contract.score_formula: 2*impact + 2*information_gain + readiness + distinctiveness + time_sensitivity - effort - wall_risk - duplication_risk
invalid_switch_reasons: a maintenance lane produced more commits

run_id_policy.w_series: Historical research identifiers. Automated and direct Progress runs must not allocate a new W number.
run_id_policy.reason: The direct-chat and hourly workstreams consumed one W-number sequence and collided repeatedly. Namespaced run IDs remove the collision without a remote lock service.

shared_surface_owners.explorations/W227-gap-analysis-to-uncond: historical input, not a live steering register
shared_surface_owners.steward/runs/: the run that created the plan; ignored operational record

required_source_fields: source-issued packet id and schema version
content SHA-256 manifest computed from git-object bytes
native, imported, fitted, and free quantities separated
live_good_stable_conditions: Proposition 1: good-stable means invariant Krein positive majorant or relatively compact image
phenomenology_return_fields: likelihood, covariance, priors, and nuisance treatment

joeops_signal_triggers: major claim killed, downgraded, or unexpectedly strengthened
paper package ready for external eyes
outside expert, paid data, or external action needed
p2c packet return materially changes the GU frontier
same hard blocker survives three daily steward reviews
concurrent work cannot be reconciled without Joe

lanes.title: Count basis-invariant Yukawa freedom
lanes.construction_fork: Use the GU-native symmetry, quotient, and source constraints. Compare, but do not silently replace them with, the standard SM effective-field-theory parameterization.
lanes.next_swing: Compute the basis-invariant dimension of the surviving Yukawa coefficient space after every built GU symmetry, quotient, and source constraint. Carry the calculation through a counterexample search, a machine-checkable rank receipt, and a decision-grade note.
lanes.kill_condition: Any independent GU-specific coefficient that can absorb the proposed mass or mixing relation kills the zero-parameter prediction family at the current construction grade.
lanes.switch_condition: If a zero-parameter invariant survives, freeze it before PDG confrontation and move to FLAVOR-OBS. If none survives, close the family negatively and activate NORM-RANK.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count a texture support pattern, fitted coefficient, basis-dependent zero, or imported observed mass as a prediction.

lanes.title: Find normalization and field-rescaling invariants
lanes.construction_fork: Use the native DeWitt/gimmel ratio-only geometry and the built source coefficients. Do not import a standard massive-spin-2 normalization as if GU fixed it.
lanes.next_swing: Compute all invariant combinations under allowed field rescalings among kappa, Z_U, mu_DW, source normalization, and physical pole parameters. State exactly which absolute scales and dimensionless ratios survive.
lanes.kill_condition: If no absolute dimensionless relation survives, close the fixed-range gravity and fixed-pole-scale prediction routes until new native dynamics is supplied.
lanes.switch_condition: A surviving native invariant activates a blind POLE-PACKET. A null result redirects prediction effort away from absolute scales.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not use the observed dark-energy density or an experimental target to select the normalization.

lanes.title: Confront a frozen flavor invariant
lanes.next_swing: Only after FLAVOR-RANK survives, freeze the invariant and its comparison procedure, then request a PDG confrontation without allowing data to alter the relation.
lanes.kill_condition: Any adjustable coefficient, basis dependence, or post-data reformulation kills the candidate.
lanes.switch_condition: Activate only on a frozen zero-parameter FLAVOR-RANK survivor.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: No data inspection before the relation and uncertainty treatment are frozen.

lanes.title: Audit the CMB-calibrated dark-energy amplitude
lanes.owner: GU structural inputs plus phenomenology return packet
lanes.next_swing: Re-solve theta-star with GU's own full D_M(z-star), including the high-redshift tail, then return a blind official-H46B likelihood adjudication.
lanes.kill_condition: If the corrected canonical amplitude remains strongly disfavored, close the positive raw-BAO amplitude leg. If it moves, report the shift without calling it a new prediction.
lanes.switch_condition: Close after one complete normalization and likelihood audit. It does not outrank the protected native-prediction lane.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: This is data hygiene and compatibility testing, not a decisive or distinctive GU prediction. Only H46B-verified likelihood inputs may seed the calculation.

lanes.title: Monitor the one-sided dark-energy amplitude ceiling
lanes.owner: gu-formalization defines the tripwire; phenomenology supplies verified data
lanes.current_authority: W226 supersedes W223 for the firing statistic. The current preregistered two-sigma edge margin is +1.11. W223's +0.032 was the DESY5 central-value margin and is not the firing margin.
lanes.next_swing: On an official new data release, verify provenance, add the frozen row to the existing monitor, and evaluate the predeclared two-sigma edge without retuning GU.
lanes.kill_condition: F1 fires only if an admissible data combination excludes w_a/(w_0+1) > -3.5 at two sigma, meaning its least-negative two-sigma edge is below -3.5.
lanes.switch_condition: No hourly run before verified new data. A fired tripwire is a Joe signal and a scientific-status review point.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Call this a one-sided falsification tripwire, never a positive GU prediction. Do not use a central value as the two-sigma firing statistic.

lanes.title: Formalize stable finite proof kernels
lanes.next_swing: Specify the exact Lean-sized W243/GU-002 extremal-weight kernel, separating abstract nilradical/extremal-weight deduction from the GU carrier premises, then implement only if the statement is stable and mathlib-feasible.
lanes.kill_condition: If the proposed Lean statement requires hiding representation faithfulness, physical interpretation, full Sp(32,32;H) construction, or interacting QFT as an axiom, leave it prose/Python and choose the next eligible finite kernel.
lanes.switch_condition: Use as reserve when the primary lane is genuinely blocked or after a primary decision-grade swing. Never promote it because it is easier to finish.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Lean verifies deduction from explicit premises. It does not prove that the premises are GU's physical realization.

lanes.title: Track the positive-majorant definition of good-stable
lanes.owner: possibility-to-capability for the firewall alternative; GU retains scope wording
lanes.next_swing: Wait for a frozen p2c packet that constructs or rejects a boundary/firewall positivity alternative to Proposition 1.
lanes.kill_condition: None inside GU. GU may only sharpen the exact boundary content and conditional consequences.
lanes.switch_condition: Reweight the portfolio only on a frozen provenance-bearing p2c return.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not treat denying Proposition 1 as a GU-built adapter.

lanes.title: Track the favorable record-conserved bit
lanes.owner: GU owns the conditional scope; cross-repo identity remains gated
lanes.next_swing: Preserve the favorable-branch dependency verbatim in every good-stable packet and await an authorized decision object. Do not infer a cross-repo identity.
lanes.kill_condition: An unfavorable record-bit decision changes the applicability of the no-go comparison. It does not retroactively falsify the mathematical theorem.
lanes.switch_condition: Any authorized branch decision is a real daily-steward reprioritization signal.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not flatten this condition into an unconditional physical GU result.

lanes.title: Construct a boundary-conditioned physical metric and observable
lanes.owner: GU after a p2c adapter packet
lanes.current_authority: The closed-interior positive-C construction is excluded for every native order-parameter class. Only a boundary-conditioned version remains relevant.
lanes.next_swing: After a valid p2c adapter return, specify the constrained physical state space, boundary-conditioned C metric, and one gauge-independent interacting observable.
lanes.kill_condition: No positive boundary-conditioned physical sector or no gauge-independent observable kills downstream pole and interference packets.
lanes.switch_condition: Activate only after frozen adapter provenance and explicit branch conditions are present.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not queue a closed-interior physical quotient under a renamed description.

lanes.title: Native chirality-safe mirror compactification
lanes.current_authority: W234/W237/W240/W241/W243 close neutral, adjoint, and charged-extremal classes, which are everything GU natively builds. GU-002 packages the result. W244 independently reverified the robust W240(C)/W243 mechanism.
lanes.next_swing: None. Preserve GU-002 and its scope conditions. The exotic nonextremal charged corridor is mathematically open but GU-non-native.
lanes.kill_condition: Already resolved as a native no-go at the recorded conditional scope.
lanes.switch_condition: Reopen only if GU supplies a genuinely source-native nonextremal order parameter or p2c returns a boundary construction that changes the question.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not turn the no-go packet into a mirror-particle prediction packet.

lanes.title: Derive a native expansion-growth relation
lanes.next_swing: Derive a parameter-free relation between non-CPL expansion structure and an independent growth observable only after native normalization and source dynamics exist.
lanes.kill_condition: A fitted amplitude, ordinary LCDM mimic with equal freedom, or absent native source dynamics kills distinctiveness.
lanes.switch_condition: Activate only when its native coefficients are frozen before data confrontation.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not fit f0 to DESI and reuse it as a prediction.

lanes.title: Hold ready papers at the external-review ceiling
lanes.owner: gu-formalization locally; external action is Joe-gated
lanes.current_authority: Observer Value Selection Theorem is locally READY FOR ZENODO. Located, Not Forced has been judged arXiv-ready internally but remains publication-deferred pending Joe's decision and outside validation.
lanes.next_swing: No routine polish. Preserve readiness, track substantive new corrections, and surface the external-eyes decision to Joe without publishing or contacting anyone.
lanes.kill_condition: Any new contradiction, novelty failure, citation failure, or reproducibility failure returns the affected paper to hardening.
lanes.switch_condition: Joe authorization or a substantive new defect, not another formatting pass.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Candidate status is not publication. Internal personas are not independent external review.

lanes.title: Bank the stationary-vacuum gravity survivor
lanes.current_authority: W225/W236/W238 make the projected-shadow cheap read structurally clear for the stationary-vacuum Schwarzschild and Kerr class. This strengthens compatibility, not distinctiveness.
lanes.next_swing: Use the paper-hardening inventory to close the highest referee-facing theorem or novelty gap only when the protected prediction lane is blocked or complete.
lanes.kill_condition: If the result is standard Willmore or quadratic-gravity structure with no new theorem-level assembly, narrow or merge the paper rather than multiplying publications.
lanes.switch_condition: Activate as a bounded byproduct only after an explicit overlap and novelty gate.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not call compatibility with Schwarzschild or Kerr a novel GU prediction.
